name: Tithe Collector Acolyte
text:
Whenever Tithe Collector Acolyte attacks, target opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. Render unto the End what is the End's.
Whenever an opponent rolls one or more dice or flips one or more coins, that player loses 1 life unless they pay {1} as a gambling tithe.
flavorText: "You can't take it with you. Especially not where we're all going. So leave it with me."
